_note: This is fictional example data for the HVAC demo. Replace with your own company information.

hours.office: Monday through Friday, 7 AM to 5 PM Eastern
hours.dispatch: Dispatch available 6 AM to 8 PM weekdays
hours.emergency: 24/7 emergency service available, call main number
hours.holidays: Closed Thanksgiving, Christmas, New Year's Day. Emergency service available.

services.commercial_hvac: We install, repair, and maintain commercial HVAC systems including rooftop units, split systems, chillers, boilers, and cooling towers.
services.building_automation: Full building automation and controls services including Niagara, Trane, Honeywell, and Johnson Controls systems.
services.preventive_maintenance: Customized PM programs for all commercial equipment. Quarterly, semi-annual, or annual plans available.
services.emergency_service: 24/7 emergency response for critical failures. On-call technicians dispatched within 1 hour for emergencies.
services.installation: New construction and retrofit HVAC installations for commercial and industrial facilities.
services.energy_services: Energy audits, efficiency upgrades, and utility rebate assistance.

service_area.counties: Philadelphia, Bucks, Montgomery, Chester, Delaware, and Camden counties
service_area.extended: Extended service area available for large commercial accounts

policies.emergency_rates: After-hours service (before 7 AM, after 5 PM, weekends, holidays) is billed at 1.5x standard labor rates.
policies.payment_terms: Net 30 for established accounts. COD for new customers. Credit cards accepted with 3% processing fee.
policies.warranty: 90-day labor warranty on all repairs. Manufacturer warranty on parts. Extended warranties available.
policies.estimates: Free estimates for PM contracts and replacement projects. Diagnostic fee applies for service calls.
policies.cancellation: 24-hour notice required for scheduled appointments. Emergency calls cannot be cancelled.

common_questions.answer: Our office is open Monday through Friday, 7 AM to 5 PM. We have 24/7 emergency service available.
We're located at 4300 Industrial Boulevard in Philadelphia, PA 19124.
Our main number is 215-555-4822. For emergencies after hours, call the same number and follow the prompts.
We offer 24/7 emergency service. After-hours calls are billed at time-and-a-half for labor. Just call our main number.
We're a commercial contractor and don't service residential homes or apartments. For residential service, I'd recommend looking up residential HVAC contractors in your area.
We accept checks and ACH payments. Credit cards are accepted with a 3% processing fee. Established accounts get net 30 terms.
All our repairs come with a 90-day labor warranty. Parts are covered by manufacturer warranty. We also offer extended warranty options.
We serve the greater Philadelphia area including Philadelphia, Bucks, Montgomery, Chester, Delaware, and Camden counties.
We provide free estimates for PM contracts and equipment replacements. For service calls, a diagnostic fee applies which is waived if you proceed with the repair.
We offer customized preventive maintenance programs with quarterly, semi-annual, or annual visits depending on your equipment and needs. These help prevent breakdowns and extend equipment life.
